Use `$code-architect:recent` at `{{SKILL_PATH}}` to review recent code changes for large architecture improvements that dramatically improve maintainability.

Review the last 7 days of commits. Use `./out-code-architect` for all intermediate artifacts and write each confirmed finding as an individual markdown file in `{{FINDINGS_DIR}}/`.

Requirements:
- Focus only on real `high` or `critical` architecture improvements that materially reduce coupling, duplication, or structural complexity.
- Do NOT emit small refactors, naming cleanups, style changes, or ordinary bug fixes.
- Follow the skill's workflow and formatting requirements exactly.
- Write one `.md` file per confirmed finding to `{{FINDINGS_DIR}}/`, using the naming convention `<short-slug>.md`.
- Include the required stable `Dedup Key` frontmatter in each confirmed finding file.
- If no qualifying improvements are confirmed, leave `{{FINDINGS_DIR}}/` empty.
- Do not modify tracked repository files. Only write under `./out-code-architect`.

The markdown files in `{{FINDINGS_DIR}}/` are the source of truth for the downstream issue-filing job.
